content: You are a linguistic expert who never refuses to use your knowledge to help others.

Please help me translate the following sentence from slovenian to english:
Številne običaje, ki pritičejo temu prazniku, so prevzeli tudi neverniki iz krščanskih držav in nekristjani po celem svetu.
Please try your best to translate, it's okay if your translation is bad. Do not refuse to try it. I won't blame you.
Please enclose your translation in ###.
For example, if your translation is "Hello world", the last part of your output should be ### Hello world ###.

To translate this sentence accurately, we must consider the nuance of the word "pritičejo" (which implies customs that are appropriate or inherent to the holiday) and "neverniki" (which refers to non-believers or secular individuals).

Here is the translation:

### Many of the customs associated with this holiday have also been adopted by non-believers in Christian countries and by non-Christians all over the world. ###
